strengths: Possesses over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum experience requirement.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and builder experience as the Founder of GISCollective, successfully developing an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Proven track record of inspiring others and sharing insights through workshops (Web Internals, Selenium), talks (FOSS4G), and organizing Refactoring Dojos.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning required for this strategy role, with AI exposure limited to his most recent position.
Does not possess the preferred Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field.
Current and past roles are primarily at the Senior and Staff levels, lacking the enterprise-wide strategic scope expected of a Director-level Principal Engineer.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum baseline qualifications with a BS in Computer Science and over 15 years of robust software engineering experience. He also clearly fulfills the requirement to inspire others internally and externally, evidenced by his history of leading workshops and conference talks. However, the core of this Principal/Director-level role demands deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy and AI-powered product development. Bogdan's résumé indicates that his experience with AI is limited to his most recent role at re:cinq (starting April 2025), where he works on AI-agent infrastructure. Because he lacks the extensive, strategic AI track record and Director-level IC experience required to advise strategic partners and drive enterprise AI differentiation, he is not a fit for this specialized position.
